creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think this is nothing more than a simple code bug.

FILE needs to be int64 aligned because it has the mbstate_t member.
findfp.c, however, doesn't know this and just assures ALIGNMENTBYTES
alignment, which on arm is 4 not 8. The more proper fix can be found
in https://reviews.freebsd.org/D4708 I believe.

While there may be other alignment issues, this is just a simple
'oops' in moreglue().
